channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matthew Gaudreau's wife announces the birth of their first child months after tragic death
item.description: Four months after her husband Matthew Gaudreau and his brother Johnny Gaudreau were killed by an alleged drunk driver, Madeline Gaudreau announced the birth of their first child.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro Picks: Lions will beat the Vikings in showdown for the NFC's No. 1 seed
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed, two division titles and two playoff spots are on the line in Week 18 of the NFL's regular season. Game No. 272 on Sunday night between the Detroit Lions and Minnesota Vikings is a showdown for the NFC North and the conference’s top spot. The loser drops to the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: PHOTOS: Blues, Blackhawks close 2024 with the Winter Classic
item.description: It's Winter Classic Day in the Windy City on New Year's Eve. The ultimate outdoor hockey showdown between the cross-state rival St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks is underway.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Dartmouth basketball players end their unionization attempt in anticipation of shifting NLRB
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Dartmouth men’s basketball team on Tuesday dropped its attempt to unionize, abruptly ending a push to become the first college athletes to bargain for a contract in order to avoid a potentially damaging precedent from a National Labor Relations Board that soon will be controlled by
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ruben Amorim is 'very excited' about where 14th-place Man United can go in 2025
item.description: His team is entering 2025 in 14th place in the Premier League but Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says he's “very excited” about the year ahead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Michigan defense pressures Milroe all day, Wolverines beat No. 11 Alabama 19-13 in ReliaQuest Bowl
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A year removed from winning the national championship, Michigan finished its first season under Sherrone Moore with a victory setting the tone for a bright future. Moore replaced Jim Harbaugh after the former Wolverines coach left for the NFL's Los Angeles Chargers last winter.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Javon Small hits go-ahead FT with 1.8 seconds left, sending West Virginia to 62-61 win over No. 7 KU
item.description: Javon Small hit the go-ahead free throw with 1.8 seconds remaining, and short-handed West Virginia held on after blowing an 18-point second-half lead to beat seventh-ranked Kansas 62-61 in an intense Big 12 opener for both teams Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trans athlete speaks out against colleges for not offering full scholarship to compete as women's runner
item.description: Transgender NCAA track and field athlete Sadie Schreiner lamented the lack of options that have been presented to trans athletes looking to transfer in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Late-game stop leads Michigan football to upset victory over Alabama in ReliaQuest Bowl
item.description: The Michigan Wolverines upset the No. 11 ranked Alabama Crimson Tide 19-13 behind their stellar defense in the ReliaQuest Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Amen Thompson suspended 2 games, Terry Rozier suspended 1 game for roles in Rockets-Heat fight
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The NBA has suspended Houston's Amen Thompson for two games and Miami's Terry Rozier for one game over their roles in a skirmish in the final moments of the Rockets-Heat game on Sunday night. The league also handed out $145,000 in fines from that game.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-Oakland youth swim coach sentenced to prison for sexually abusing student
item.description: David Teel, 57, agreed to a 3-year prison term as part of a plea deal with Alameda County prosecutors.
item.dc:creator: Nate Gartrell, The Mercury News

item.title: Resting or playing running back Saquon Barkley is a tougher decision than it seems for Eagles
item.description: Saquon Barkley’s pursuit of Eric Dickerson’s 40-year-old rushing record could get grounded by his coach. Nick Sirianni’s decision is more difficult than it seems. Barkley needs 101 yards rushing against his former team on Sunday to set the NFL’s single-season record.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Quinn Ewers has massive offer to leave Texas, enter transfer portal after season: report
item.description: Texas Longhorns quarterback Quinn Ewers reportedly has a massive offer on the table for him to leave school next year and enter the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A jet carrying the Gonzaga men's basketball team ordered to stop to avoid collision at LAX
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Federal Aviation Administration has launched an investigation after a private jet carrying the Gonzaga University men’s basketball team nearly crossed a runway as another flight was taking off Friday at Los Angeles International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL Playoff Guide: Postseason bracket much clearer with 1 week remaining in regular season
item.description: It's Week 18 of the NFL season, which means just one more weekend remains before postseason action begins. The two-time defending Super Bowl champion Kansas City Chiefs and star quarterback Patrick Mahomes look like a formidable opponent once again and have already clinched the No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Riley Leonard's passing game improvement key for Notre Dame in CFP quarterfinal against Georgia
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — When quarterback Riley Leonard transferred from Duke to Notre Dame for the 2024 season, he immediately went to work building chemistry with his new teammates. He brought six Fighting Irish receivers to his home in Fairhope, Ala.
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears wrap up trying 2024 season vs. Packers on Sunday at noon in Green Bay
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the ball left the hand of Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels with no time left on the clock on Oct. 27 in Washington, the Bears were 4-2 and just needed to swat the ball to the ground to finish off their fourth straight win. Instead, the ball was batted into the air.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2024 Holiday Bowl: Homegrown Cougars leave it all on the field in front of hometown crowd
item.description: While a depleted Washington State may not have tasted any eggnog this year in the Holiday Bowl after falling short to Syracuse 52-35, a few San Diego locals still making a memory of a lifetime playing on the big stage in front of their hometown crowd.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Jake Evans scores for the career-high 4th consecutive game, surging Canadiens beat Lightning 5-2
item.description: Jake Evans scored for the career-high fifth consecutive game and the surging Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from his family released by the network on Friday. He was 78.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5
